subcodes.first_line: O thou who art imprisoned in the path of God, alongside those who have been martyred in His way! Verily, he who hath drunk deep of the wine of martyrdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سجن فی سبیل الله مع من استشهد فی سبیل الله ان الذی ثمل من سلاف الشهاده
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
